creator: skozlov@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 179017
The Patch (gzip'ed)

Changes:
- Repocopy testproc www/kibana44 to www/kibana46
- Make RUN_DEPENDS in the master port (www/kibana45) override-able because kibana 4.6.x used different node version.
- Adjust pkg-descr Elasticsearch support information
- Re-generate pkg-plist and distnifo

The patch is gzip'ed due to attachment oversize.

Upstream release notes: https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/kibana/4.6/releasenotes.html
